text: and visual prompt. A wide overhead to ground establishing shot of a once sacred forest grove at twilight.
The trees are half dead. They're bark split and weeping black sap that pools in the roots.
Pale fungal groats climb the trunks.
In the center, kale the human shaman kneels beside a stone altar. His lean frame hunched,
braided, dart hair falling forward over his face as he touches the corrupted earth.
His deer skin robes are smeared with suit. Spidle tattoos on his forearms glow faint
amber against the dying light. The camera is low, looking up slightly through the twisted roots,
giving the grove a cathedral-like claustrophobia. The color palette is muted charcoal,
sickly ochre, and faint amber from the tattoo glow. Heavy fog clings to the ground.
The atmosphere is suffocating and ancient.
